# Savelle McThias — UX/UI Designer

> Savelle McThias is a UX/UI designer and Digital Experience Leader with two decades of
> experience, based in Scottsdale, Arizona. Specializing in enterprise SaaS, e-commerce,
> conversion optimization, design systems, and AI-enhanced design workflows. Available
> for project work, monthly retainers, fractional design leadership, and remote engagements.

## Work & Background

- [Case Studies](https://savellem.com/work): Selected UX/UI projects with objectives, role, scope, and outcomes.
- [Green Compass — Digital Experience Leadership](https://savellem.com/case-studies/green-compass-digital-experience): Full-funnel digital experience leadership in the regulated CBD wellness industry.
- [About](https://savellem.com/about): Background, professional experience, and the brands worked with (PetSmart, Plexus Worldwide, Green Compass, and others).

## Contact

- [Contact](https://savellem.com/contact): Email savellem@gmail.com, LinkedIn linkedin.com/in/savelle. Based in Scottsdale, AZ; available remotely.
